label: Bake a Cake
subject: Baking a cake (a recipe)
bossHook: Turn a pile of ingredients into a finished, frosted cake — in an order that doesn't collapse.

order-matters.title: First Things First
order-matters.hook: You can't bake a batter you haven't mixed. Put these three in a working order.
order-matters.winText: Mix → bake → serve. Order matters: each step depends on the one before it.

prerequisite.title: The Foundation
prerequisite.hook: Some steps unlock others. Find the one thing that has to happen first, then build on it.
prerequisite.winText: Gathering the ingredients came first — batter and frosting both needed them. That's a prerequisite.

failText.wrong-start: You started with a step that needs something else first. Begin with what needs nothing — the ingredients.
failText.dependency-violation: That step ran before its prerequisite existed. Put the thing it needs earlier.

the-chain.title: The Whole Chain
the-chain.hook: Make batter, pour it into two tins, then bake both layers. Some steps wait on others; trace the chain.
the-chain.winText: Both tins waited on the batter, and baking waited on both being filled. You traced the whole chain.

failText.wrong-start: Start with the step that needs nothing.
failText.dependency-violation: You baked or poured before the batter it depends on existed.

boss-pipeline.title: BOSS · The Finished Cake
boss-pipeline.hook: Six steps, two branches that must converge. Take raw ingredients to a frosted, served cake.
boss-pipeline.winText: Cake served. Batter and frosting both branched off the ingredients, then converged at assembly. Same shape as the build pipeline — different subject.

failText.wrong-start: Begin with the step that needs nothing — gathering the ingredients.
failText.dependency-violation: A step ran before something it depends on. Trace what each one needs.

missing-foundation.title: SIDE-QUEST · Foundation First
missing-foundation.hook: You keep cooking before you have what you need. Drill it: place the ONE step everything else needs, first.
missing-foundation.winText: Ingredients first, then the rest. The foundation is whatever needs nothing and unlocks everything.

failText.wrong-start: Still starting in the wrong place — lead with the step that has no prerequisites.
failText.dependency-violation: Put the foundation before the steps that depend on it.
